Created attachment 181928
gconf2-3.2.6_4.patch

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: '/usr/bin/env python' is an invalid shebang you need USES=shebangfix for 'bin/gsettings-schema-convert'
Error: /usr/local/bin/gconf-merge-tree is linked to /usr/local/lib/libdbus-1.so.3 from devel/dbus but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libdbus-1.so:devel/dbus
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/gconf2
